stickyWhatsAppButton.tooltipDesktop: Start with a free day — no commitment needed
stickyWhatsAppButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi Power Fitness, I'd like to know more about the free 1-day trial.

specs.animation: none — no pulse, no bounce, no notification badge

headlineOptions.optionB: Chennai's Most Trusted Weight Loss Gym — Real Results in 90 Days.
headlineOptions.optionC: The Best Gym in Chennai for People Who Are Done Starting Over.

heroSection.recommendedHeadline: Option A for above-the-fold emotional resonance. Pair with Option C as the meta title tag for SEO.
heroSection.subHeadline: This is where ordinary people become unstoppable. One workout at a time, one rep at a time, you will become the strongest version of yourself.

backgroundImage.artDirectionNote: Do not use stock. The hero image must be a real interior shot of Power Fitness — natural lighting, visible equipment, at least one real member (non-posed). This is a copy-adjacent decision; the image is a trust signal and must match the empathetic tone.
backgroundImage.overlayNote: Use a subtle dark overlay (≤40% opacity) to keep H1 contrast ratio WCAG-compliant.
backgroundImage.altText: Real members training at Power Fitness gym in Chennai, Chennai

primaryButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessageTask3: Hi, I'd like a free 1-day trial at Power Fitness

labelOptions.optionC: Book My Free Trial on WhatsApp →

primaryButton.microCopyBelowButton: No joining fee. No commitment. Just show up.
primaryButton.secondaryMicroCopyBelowButton: We reply within 30 minutes during gym hours.
primaryButton.abTestRecommendation: Run Option A (Get My Free 1-Day Trial) against Option C (Book My Free Trial on WhatsApp) in Week 3–4. The word WhatsApp in the button label may increase tap rate for the Tamil Nadu audience where WhatsApp familiarity is near-universal.

footer.developerNote: Four distinct horizontal bands stacked vertically: (1) Pre-Footer Trust Reinforcement Strip, (2) Primary Footer four-column information grid, (3) Google Maps Embed full-width, (4) Legal Footer Bar. Dark charcoal or deep navy background.

preFooterTrustStrip.stripCopy: Power Fitness · Established 2014 · 1,200+ Members Trained · Rated [X.X] Stars on Google · Chennai, Chennai
preFooterTrustStrip.designNote: Same warm accent colour used in Female-First block, Reassurance Strip, and Guarantee Panel. Full-width, single centred line, generous vertical padding.

columnAbout.heading: Power Fitness
columnAbout.body: Chennai's most transparent gym — real pricing, named trainers, and a 90-day results guarantee that we have stood behind since 2014. We train real people in Chennai and we are not going anywhere.
columnAbout.socialProofMicroLine: Serving Chennai since 2014 · 1,200+ members and counting.

columnOperatingHours.heading: We Are Open
columnOperatingHours.whatsAppAvailabilityLine: WhatsApp enquiries answered 6AM – 10PM, 7 days a week.
columnOperatingHours.afterHoursReassurance: Message us after hours — we reply first thing in the morning. Your message will not get lost.

columnContact.heading: Find Us. Call Us. Message Us.

phoneBlock.label: Call or WhatsApp
phoneBlock.subLabel: We answer between 5:30AM and 10PM, seven days a week.
phoneBlock.ariaLabel: Call Power Fitness in Chennai, Chennai

whatsAppBlock.label: Message Us on WhatsApp

whatsAppBlock.belowButtonMicroLine: We reply within 30 minutes during gym hours.

emailBlock.label: Email Us
emailBlock.ariaLabel: Email Power Fitness — we respond within 4 hours during gym hours
emailBlock.subLabel: Response within 4 hours during gym hours.

physicalAddressBlock.label: Visit Us
physicalAddressBlock.parkingNote: Free parking available — [X] spaces in front of the building.

gstBusinessRegistration.registrationText: Power Fitness · GST Registration No: [XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX] · Registered Business, Chennai, Tamil Nadu
gstBusinessRegistration.subLine: GST receipts issued for all membership payments. Request yours at the front desk or via WhatsApp.

googleMapsEmbed.developerNote: Full-width interactive Google Maps embed. Minimum height 400px on desktop, 300px on mobile. Interactive — pinch-to-zoom, tap-to-navigate, Get Directions button functional. Do not use a static map screenshot. Implement LocalBusiness schema markup.
googleMapsEmbed.aboveEmbedLine: We are right here in Chennai, Chennai. Come see us.
googleMapsEmbed.getDirectionsAriaLabel: Get directions to Power Fitness in Chennai, Chennai
googleMapsEmbed.errorState: Map unavailable right now. Our address: [Full Address]. Search us on Google Maps — "Power Fitness"
googleMapsEmbed.neighbourhoodSeoLine: Power Fitness serves members from across Chennai — including [Neighborhood 1], [Neighborhood 2], [Neighborhood 3], [Neighborhood 4], and [Neighborhood 5]. If you are searching for the best gym in Chennai — you have found it.

bilingualTranslations.developerNote: Commission accurate Tamil translations — do not use a translation plugin. Use Noto Sans Tamil via Google Fonts.

states.trigger: wa.me link on device without WhatsApp
states.microcopy: WhatsApp isn't installed. Call us instead: +91 98765 43210
Opening WhatsApp Web — or scan the QR code to message us from your phone.

contactForm.note: Secondary conversion path for Contact page only. The blueprint explicitly recommends avoiding forms — they drop completion rates by ~70% in the Tamil Nadu market.

fields.label: WhatsApp / Phone Number
fields.placeholder: Your number — we won't spam, ever

fields.label: Your Goal
fields.placeholder: e.g., lose weight, build muscle, get consistent

fields.label: Anything else?
fields.placeholder: Tell us what you're looking for — or leave this blank

submitButton.successState: Sent! We'll be in touch shortly.

validationErrors.message: We'd love to know what to call you — even just a first name works.
Looks like a digit might be missing — double-check your number?
Just the digits work fine — no dashes or spaces needed.
We need your number to reach you — we promise, no spam.
What brings you to Power Fitness? Even one word helps us prepare.

successPanel.headline: We've Got Your Details — and We're Already Looking Forward to Meeting You.
successPanel.subText: Someone from Power Fitness will reach out on WhatsApp or by phone within 30 minutes during gym hours. If you sent this after 10PM — we'll reply first thing in the morning. Your message will not get lost.

optionalCta.label: While you wait — watch a member's story →
optionalCta.ariaLabel: Watch a member testimonial video from Power Fitness while you wait for our response

states.microcopy: Just a moment — loading the next part...
Video unavailable right now. Watch [Name]'s story on our Instagram: @[gymhandle]
[Name] made it to 90 days. You can too. → Get My Free Trial
states.conversionNote: Visitor is at peak emotional engagement when the video ends. This state fires a CTA immediately.

pageLoad.extendedLoadMessage: Taking a little longer than usual. Worth the wait — promise.
pageLoad.renderNote: Not a full-screen spinner — a thin progress bar at the top of the viewport plus a single line of text.

notFoundPage.headline: This Page Took a Wrong Turn. Your Fitness Journey Doesn't Have To.
notFoundPage.subText: The page you were looking for has moved or doesn't exist. But Power Fitness does — and your free 1-day trial is still waiting.

secondaryCta.label: Chat With Us on WhatsApp →
secondaryCta.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi Power Fitness, I landed on a broken page on your website and couldn't find what I was looking for. Can you help?
